title: Data supporting the results of the manuscript "Dendriplexes in alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma therapy"
author: Ziemba, Barbara
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains raw and processed data supporting the results of the manuscript "Dendriplexes in alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma therapy". 
 Files: - In_vitro_data.xlsx – raw viability, toxicity and migration assay data, qPCR results. - In_vivo_data.xlsx – tumor volume and body weight data, blood analysis raw data, qPCR results, resection data.  Raw qPCR data could not be deposited due to irreversible loss of the original files. All analyzed and summarized data used for statistical evaluation are provided in the repository.
